title: Lead Investment Banker at Lodha & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Lodha & Co
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha & Co are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!
